ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld 1.6 endgame expansion built around controlled summoning, infernal infrastructure, custom abyssal UI, and boss-driven progression.
Build the Abyssal Summoning Circle and Abyssal Forge, gather Abyssal Residue and sigils, trigger controlled hostile encounters, survive abyssal elites and bosses, and convert the spoils into stronger weapons, implants, and deeper infernal-tech access.
Includes custom summoning and forge systems, bespoke abyssal consoles, residue and sigil progression, Sigil Vault support, circle modules and instability, hostile manifestations, multiple abyssal enemies, miniboss and boss content, custom weapons and implants, VFX/audio work, and EN/RU localization.
Active Alpha: already playable and content-rich, but still expanding.
